title: dead-socket reap hardening
description: Require N consecutive deep liveness-probe failures before a sibling launcher reaps the mk-spec-memory lease owner and respawns. maybeBridgeLeaseHolder now calls probeLeaseHolderWithRetries: the first probe keeps its tuned full timeout, then up to N-1 short retries with a small backoff; any 'alive' short-circuits to a bridge and only an all-failures run respawns. Defaults (1 retry, 1500ms retry timeout, 250ms backoff) keep the worst case inside the 6999ms probe grace ceiling, and dead sockets fail fast. Tunable/disablable via SPECKIT_LEASE_PROBE_RETRIES. Second of the deferred daemon-reliability hardening items from phase 017.
